UpdateSourceArgs: -c "set -e; cd \"{{$FullRootDir}}\"; mkdir -p .proton {{$FullRootDir}}.proton/compatdata {{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/steam {{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk32 {{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk64 {{$FullBaseDir}}.config/protonfixes; echo 'Checking latest Proton GE version'; ProtonVersion=$(wget -qO- https://api.github.com/repos/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/latest | grep tag_name | cut -d '"' -f4); if [ -z \"$ProtonVersion\" ]; then echo 'Failed to detect Proton GE version'; exit 1; fi; if [ -f {{$FullRootDir}}.proton/version ] && grep -q \"$ProtonVersion\" {{$FullRootDir}}.proton/version; then echo 'Latest Proton GE already installed'; exit 0; fi; echo 'Downloading Proton GE:' $ProtonVersion; wget -qO proton.tar.gz https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/download/$ProtonVersion/$ProtonVersion.tar.gz; rm -rf {{$FullRootDir}}.proton/*; tar -xzf proton.tar.gz -C {{$FullRootDir}}.proton --strip-components=1; rm proton.tar.gz; chmod +x {{$FullRootDir}}.proton/proton; echo $ProtonVersion > {{$FullRootDir}}.proton/version; echo 'Proton GE installed'; if [ -f {{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so ]; then cp {{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so {{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk32/; fi; if [ -f {{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp {{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so {{$FullBaseDir}}.steam/sdk64/; fi"
